details.test: Task 1: Buy two cheapest standard tickets under $60 for nearest Chicago concert
Task 2: Add two medium black T-shirts under $35 to cart
Task 3: Join fan club plan under $15/month with at least two 'exclusive' perks
Task 4: Create 'Workout Mix' playlist with up to 6 fast songs under 4 minutes
Task 5: Add cheapest 2018–2022 studio album (>=10 tracks) digital download to cart
Task 6: Subscribe to Monthly Tour Updates newsletter with Chicago and New York preferences
Task 7: Open most recent song with 'Night' in title in print-friendly lyrics mode
Task 8: Add merch bundle with hoodie and poster under $80 to cart
Task 9: Submit event booking request for 300-person corporate show on 2026-10-15
